sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106004" key="turoglu/fos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τῡρο-γλύφος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[γλῠ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n106004.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Cheese-scooper,</tr_> name of a mouse in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:137" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">137</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
